title: Fatty Peruvian Chicken Causa Limena
description: A hearty Peruvian dish featuring chicken, rice, and vegetables, with a crispy Rice Krispies crust, made FODMAP friendly and incorporating nuka pickle for added flavor, all in a traditional causa limena form.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the chopped nuka pickle, garlic-free seasoning, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked chicken mixture, cooled white rice, and lime juice, and mix well.
In a separate bowl, mix the crushed Rice Krispies with a pinch of salt.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with olive oil and create a layer of the Rice Krispies mixture on the bottom.
Add the chicken and rice mixture on top of the Rice Krispies layer, and smooth the top.
Bake the causa limena in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the filling is hot and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
